---
title: "CRPTO Manuscript Index"
author: "Anonymous"
lang: en
format: html
---

# Active IJDS Manuscript

The single active paper is
`CRPTO_ijds.qmd`, with online supplement `supplement_ijds.qmd` and official
INFORMS source `submission/CRPTO_ijds_submission.tex`.

The active claim registry is
`../docs/research/active_claims_2026-07-10.md`. The experiment uses a
status-independent 540,121-loan universe, a 2012-selected conformal upper-score
guardrail, and 15 separate monthly 2016--2017 decisions. It finds a genuine
trade-off: lower default, lower standardized payoff, and worse funded-set
miscoverage relative to point PD.

Compact-v7, A1--A40, and external-dataset experiments are historical
provenance. They do not define or validate the active paper.

# Build

```powershell
just ijds-evidence
just paper-submission
just paper-submission-official
```
